source_papers.title: Clarification of the molecular mechanisms underlying glyphosate-induced major depressive disorder: a network toxicology approach

scoring.formula: score = min((log(ab+1) + log(bc+1)) * novelty / 10, 1.0); novelty = 1.0 if direct==0 else 0.7 / (direct+1)
